summary: Comprehensive frontend UI/UX redesign testing of MycoTrack. Validated mobile-first layout, role-based navigation (admin/operator/viewer), culture card grid, add culture flow, culture detail page with all action buttons, add event, create child culture (with parent pre-fill), mobile hamburger drawer, and absence of 'Made with Emergent' badge. All critical flows pass. Approximately 33/33 functional checks pass; the only 'failures' in the run were test-script artifacts (case-sensitive matching against CSS-uppercased labels), not real UI bugs (the four stat cards render correctly as confirmed by full-page screenshots).
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.js renders <NavItems> twice (desktop + drawer) so any [data-testid="nav-*"] selector matches two DOM nodes. Not a defect (one is hidden via lg:flex/lg:hidden) but tests must use :visible filter or a context-scoped locator.

Tailwind 'uppercase' class on stat-card labels means Playwright inner_text returns uppercase; consider adding data-testid (e.g. stat-card-total, stat-card-active) on each StatCard to make tests deterministic.
Dashboard.js: when canWrite, 'Add Culture' navigates to /cultures (does not directly open the modal). Acceptable but slightly inconsistent with the CultureList button which opens the modal in-place.
CultureCard onChild/onEvent on Dashboard navigate to detail instead of opening the modal — fine but worth a UX comment.
CrudPanel and CultureFormModal both fetch /species, /locations, /recipes — could be hoisted to a shared context to avoid duplicate fetches.
ESLint disable for exhaustive-deps in CultureList useMemo is benign but should include all reactive deps for safety.
seed_data_creation: Created species 'Pleurotus ostreatus' and cultures PO-2026-RUN2, PO-2026-RUN2-CHILD, PO-2026-RUN3 via UI for verification. No leftover PTEST/CTEST/EVCTEST ids found.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign fully validated. If retesting, use data-testid selectors. For nav links inside the mobile drawer, prefer page.locator('[data-testid="nav-cultures"]:visible').first because NavItems is rendered twice (desktop sidebar + mobile drawer). When asserting stat-card text, either case-insensitively match or rely on numeric values — labels render in CSS uppercase. Cultures persist between runs in local Postgres.
validated_flows: Dashboard: welcome header, 4 stat cards, Recent cultures, dashboard-add-culture btn
Cultures list: add-culture-btn opens culture-form modal; culture-code-input, culture-species-select, culture-type-input, culture-form-submit create a card; modal auto-closes
Culture cards: species + #code + status badge + type + location + date + card-print-label + card-add-event + card-child-culture
Card click navigates to /cultures/:id (culture-detail), shows detail-add-event, detail-print-label, detail-child-culture, detail-edit
detail-add-event opens event modal with event-type-select, event-notes-input, event-form-submit; event appears as event-timeline-item; admin sees delete-event-button
detail-child-culture opens culture-form pre-filled with 'Parent: <code>'; submit creates child
Mobile 390x844: mobile-menu-button visible, desktop sidebar hidden, drawer opens, nav click navigates and closes drawer; grid uses grid-cols-1 (single column)
Operator: no nav-users; add-culture-btn present; detail-edit present; NO delete-event-button
Viewer: no nav-users; no add-culture-btn, no empty-add-culture-btn, no card-add-event, no card-child-culture, no detail-edit/add-event/child; detail-print-label still visible (read-only print is OK)
